offer.title: I build digital growth structures for industrial B2B companies.
offer.subtitle: From market entry to sales systems and scalable operations: I turn complex industrial growth challenges into executable commercial structures.
offer.usp: My USP: I combine 15+ years of international market-building with hands-on CRM, ERP, e-commerce, and automation implementation, so strategy becomes working infrastructure.
points:
Market Entry & Internationalization
Go-to-market, partners, distribution, and sales structures for Asia, the Americas, and late-entry markets.

Digital B2B Sales & E-Commerce
CRM, quoting, ordering, and customer workflows that shorten cycles and improve transparency.

Process Automation & Operations
Lean responsibilities, automated reporting, and scalable order handling for growing teams.

about.headline: Building industrial technology businesses, from strategy to execution.
about.body:
My career has been shaped by building businesses under real-world conditions: new markets, limited resources, and high complexity.

Over the past 15+ years, I have built, scaled, and stabilized industrial companies across Europe, North America, and Asia — often in situations without a blueprint, where execution mattered more than theory.

I work hands-on at the intersection of market, organization, and technology: from go-to-market strategy and sales & supply-chain structures to operational systems such as CRM, ERP, and reporting. For me, strategy does not end with a concept — it ends with measurable results.

Outside of work, I find balance in sailing and hiking. Both strongly influence how I work: setting a clear course, planning ahead, navigating uncertainty, and making decisions as conditions change.
highlights: Built international industrial businesses from the ground up, including in the U.S., China, and APAC
Scaled revenue from $0.8M to $13.5M while achieving >15% EBITDA
Established customer-centric go-to-market models (NPS >60, NRR ~126%)
Designed and implemented custom CRM, ERP, and accounting systems for real operational workflows
Developed partner and distribution networks across North America, APAC, and MENA

personal.title: Away from the desk, I prefer weather, water, and open terrain.
personal.intro: Skiing, cycling, and hiking keep me outside, but sailing is the one I come back to most. On the water, plans matter, conditions change, and good decisions come from reading both the instruments and the horizon.

timeline.title: Founder & CEO, INTUTEC LLC
timeline.detail: Founded INTUTEC to support industrial companies with market entry, commercial transformation, and digital execution systems. The model combines strategy, hands-on implementation, and practical tools for sales development, lead management, partner structures, and scalable market access. Schlegel USA became the first reference customer, validating the approach through a successful U.S. market-entry and commercial buildout project.
highlights: Market-entry and transformation strategies for industrial companies.
Executional support for sales development, lead generation, and partner structures.
Digital tools for lead management, contact assignment, and customer qualification.
White-label platform logic and website-integrated sales workflows.

timeline.title: President, Schlegel USA Inc.
timeline.detail: Built and scaled the U.S. business from the ground up through an INTUTEC mandate, starting with a two-person core team and a $250,000 initial budget. Developed the go-to-market approach, established scalable commercial and operating structures, and grew the business to more than 2,500 orders per year.
highlights: Built the U.S. market-entry platform and commercial foundation for scalable growth.
Automated key sales, order, and reporting processes to support a lean operating model.
Developed the business toward a scalable operating model ahead of the planned handover.

timeline.title: CEO & President, CAPTRON North America LP
timeline.detail: Built and scaled the North American subsidiary from early-stage setup to a profitable, self-funded business. Increased annual revenue from $0.8M to $13.5M, achieved more than 15% EBITDA, improved delivery performance from 56% to 88% OTIF, and secured strategic product listings with Amazon, Tesla, and Apple.
highlights: Built the commercial and operational foundation for scalable growth.
Localized supply chain and fulfillment to improve delivery reliability and customer satisfaction.
Developed digital operating systems to improve transparency, execution, and management control.

timeline.title: Head of Business Development, CAPTRON Electronic GmbH
timeline.detail: Developed new markets, applications, and customer segments as the foundation for CAPTRON’s international growth strategy. Built the North American market through a new distribution network and developed the strategy and business plan for the future U.S. subsidiary.
highlights: Built distribution and partner structures across North America and selected international markets.
Increased export momentum through new distributors, applications, and customer segments.
Developed the strategic foundation for the later CAPTRON North America subsidiary.

timeline.title: Regional Manager Asia, SATECO Asia Limited
timeline.detail: Developed and implemented the market-entry strategy for China, including the setup of a FICE in Suzhou. Managed regional business across China, India, and Korea and built relationships with OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers in the automotive sector.
highlights: Established the local market-entry foundation for China.
Built regional customer relationships across OEM and Tier-1 supplier networks.
Supported local teams and manufacturing sites through technical coordination and operational problem-solving.

timeline.title: GM & Commercial Roles (Mentor, MBG, Eisbär)
timeline.detail: Earlier commercial and management roles in electronics, premium brands, procurement, and consulting. Built early experience across general management, sourcing, international coordination, and customer-facing commercial work.

cookieConsent.title: Privacy preferences
cookieConsent.intro: Required settings keep the site working and remember choices like language, theme, and this privacy selection. You can also allow optional extras; when enabled, they may load automatically while you browse.
cookieConsent.externalServicesBlocked: Optional embedded content is off. Enable it to load maps, live data, and media previews.

necessary.title: Required site functions
necessary.description: Needed for security, forms, downloads, sign-in, and preferences you choose.

analytics.title: Usage statistics
analytics.description: Helps understand which pages and sections are used so the site can be improved. Names, contact details, messages, CV requests, and admin data are not sent to this service.

externalServices.title: Embedded content and live data
externalServices.description: Allows maps, live information, media previews, and automatic language suggestions. Names, contact details, messages, CV requests, and admin data are not sent to these providers; they may receive technical browser data needed to load the content.

impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.lead: Provider identification for {{siteName}} according to § 5 Digitale-Dienste-Gesetz (DDG).

provider.title: Provider
provider.missingAddress: Postal address must be completed before publication.

dispute.title: Consumer dispute resolution
dispute.body: I am not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

liability.title: Liability for content and links
liability.body: I prepare the content on this website with reasonable care. External links lead to third-party websites whose content is outside my control. The respective provider or operator is responsible for linked content.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: This policy explains how {{siteName}} processes personal data when you visit the website, use the contact form, or connect third-party publishing features.

visit.title: Data processed when you visit the website
paragraphs: When the website is loaded, technical data may be processed to deliver the site securely and reliably. This can include IP address, request time, requested URL, referrer, browser type, device information, and server log data.
The legal basis is legitimate interest in operating, securing, and improving this website under Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.

contact.title: Contact, lead capture, and email verification
paragraphs: If you use the contact form or request a CV download, the submitted name, email address, phone number where requested, request type, message, source type, verification status, timestamps, and technical request data such as IP address, approximate country, state, address, browser, referrer, and page URL may be stored as a lead record.
Email is sent through the configured mail provider. Lead records are kept only as long as needed for communication, documentation, download protection, and abuse prevention.

storage.title: Local storage, cookies, and admin sessions
storage.body: The public website stores necessary preferences in your browser, including manual language and theme choices and the privacy preference itself. Admin-only areas use secure session cookies for authentication and account protection. Optional categories can be accepted, rejected, changed, or withdrawn through the privacy settings link in the footer.

analytics.title: Google Analytics
paragraphs: Google Analytics is loaded only if you consent to the Analytics category in the privacy preferences. It is used to understand aggregate website usage and improve the public website.

The site does not send your name, contact details, messages, CV requests, or admin data to Google Analytics. If enabled, Google may process device, browser, interaction, and approximate location data according to its own privacy terms. You can withdraw consent at any time through the privacy settings link in the footer.

external.title: Maps, weather, media, and external services
paragraphs: Some public sections can load third-party services or content. Automatic loading of Mapbox maps, cached Open-Meteo weather data, external webcam images, and country-based language detection is blocked until you consent to optional external services. Weather data is requested through this site's server cache; other loaded providers may receive technical data such as your IP address and browser information.
The site does not send your name, contact details, messages, CV requests, or admin data to these optional external content providers.
Outbound links to GitHub, LinkedIn, Koalendar, webcam source pages, or similar third-party sites are opened only when you choose them.
Uploaded post media, site assets, and CV files may be stored with a configured object storage provider and delivered through public asset URLs.

linkedin.title: LinkedIn publishing integration
paragraphs: If a LinkedIn publishing integration is connected in the admin area, LinkedIn OAuth is used to request authorization from the connected LinkedIn member account. The application may store LinkedIn access tokens, account identifiers, selected post text, article links, and publication timestamps for the purpose of publishing or managing posts selected by the admin.
Access can be revoked through LinkedIn account settings or by disconnecting the integration once that feature is available in the admin area.

ai.title: AI-assisted post editing
ai.body: Admin users can choose to send post title, summary, content, and prompt text to an AI provider to draft or improve blog content. This processing only happens when an authenticated admin starts an AI action.

legalBases.title: Legal bases
items: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR for consent-based integrations, optional analytics, external media/maps, and automatic language detection.
Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR where processing is needed to respond to a request or provide a requested function.
Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR for secure operation, abuse prevention, and improvement of the website.
Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR where retention is required by law.

rights.title: Your rights
paragraphs: Subject to the applicable legal conditions, you may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, portability, or object to processing of your personal data. You may also withdraw consent with effect for the future where processing is based on consent.
You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a competent data protection supervisory authority.

updates.title: Updates
updates.body: This policy may be updated when the website, third-party integrations, or legal requirements change. The date above shows the latest version.
